subtasks.description: Evaluate deployment request against change management and maintenance window policies. Check if engineer u_7732 has authorization to deploy to prod-us-east-1, verify whether current timestamp (2:15 AM UTC Tuesday) falls within approved maintenance windows, and assess hotfix exception criteria.

plan.cost_rationale: Single subtask assigned to policy_action because the query explicitly requests governance/compliance evaluation: determining whether the deployment is permitted under policy. Tier is mid because the evaluation requires multi-signal reasoning (engineer authorization, timestamp comparison against maintenance windows, hotfix exception criteria) across potentially multiple policy rules, rather than a simple single-rule lookup.

output.reason: Deployment denied for three compounding violations: (1) POL-401: User u_7732 holds role 'engineer', which does not meet the minimum required role of 'senior-engineer' for production deployments. (2) POL-403: Current time Tuesday 02:15 UTC falls outside the only approved maintenance window (Saturday 22:00 – Sunday 06:00 UTC). (3) POL-402: Because this deployment is outside the approved maintenance window, CAB approval is mandatory — no evidence of CAB approval was provided. Although a hotfix exception was referenced in the request, no hotfix exception policy exists in the registry to override these requirements. All three policy violations must be resolved before deployment can proceed.
applied_constraints: User role 'engineer' must be elevated to at minimum 'senior-engineer' to authorize production deployments (POL-401).
Deployment must either be rescheduled to the approved maintenance window (Saturday 22:00 – Sunday 06:00 UTC) or obtain documented CAB approval prior to proceeding (POL-402, POL-403).
If a hotfix exception process exists outside the current policy registry, it must be formally invoked and approved by the Change Advisory Board before this action can be re-evaluated.
All approvals and role verifications must be logged and attached to the change record before re-submission.
